raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un feptitâ Reisè kad tee
Preesteri ar Taurehm taureja /
fazztja Josuûs us teem Laudim:
Gawilejeet / jo tas KUNGS irr
jums to Pilsfahtu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Pilsfahts un wiſs
tas eekſch ta irr/ buhs tam KUN-
GAM isdeldehts ktuht/ Rakaba
tikkat ta Mauka laid dsihwa pa-
leê / un wiſſi / kas pee winnas
Namunâ irr / jo winna irr tohs
Wehstus paſlehpnſi / ko mehs bi-
jam isfuhttijſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tikkai fargajeetees no ta/
: kas isdeldeins irr/ ka juhs paſchi
ne isdeldatees / nemdaini no ta/
kas isdeldeins irr/ un darrat/ ka
tas Israëta Lehgeris isdeldehts
tohp/ un apbehdinajat to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet wiſtas Sudrabs un
Selts / un tee Warra un Dſelses
Rihki lai tas tam KUNGA M
fwehts irr / tam buhs pee ta
KUNGA Mantu nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu tee Laudis gawi-
leja / kad ar Taurehm taurehts
tappe / un kad tee Laudis tahs
Taureschanas Skannu dsirdeja/
gawileja tee Laudis ar leelu Ga-
wileschanu / un tas Muhris ap-
gua/ un tee Laudis kahpe Pils-
fahta teefscham preeſsch fevis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ußnehme to Pilsfahtu/
un isdeldeja wiſu kas Pilsfahta
biia / tik labbi Wihrus / fa See-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Josuûs us
teem diwi Wihreem/tahs Seines
Iſluhkeem : Eite pee tahs See-
was/tahs Maukas Nammu/ un
isweddeet no turrenes to Seewu/
un wiſſu/ kas winnae peederr/ it-
tin fa juhs winnae efat swehrej-
ſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gabje tee Jauneſti/tee
Iſluhſti/ un iswedde Rakabu/ un
winnae Tehwu / un winnae
Mahti/ un winnae Brahtus/ un
wiſſu / kas winnae peederreja/ tee
iswedde arridsan wiſus winnae
Raddus/un likke tohs ahra palieſt/
ahran to Israëta Lehgeri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Pilsfahtu tadedsi-
naja tee ar Uggunt/ ar wiſſu/ kas
eekſch ta bija/ tomehr to Sudra-
bu un to Seltn / lihds ar teem
Warra un Dſelses Rihkeem/ likke
tee pee ta KUNGA Namna
Mantas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet to Mauku Rakabu/
un winnae Tehwa Namnu/ un
wiſſu/ kas winnae peederreja/ pa-
mette Josuûs dsihwn / un winna
irr Israëta Widdû palikkuſi lihds
ſchodeen / tapehz ka winna tohs
Wehstus bij paſlehpuſi/ ko Josuûs
bij isfuhttijſ Jeriku isluhkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tanni Laika swehreja
Josuûs/ un fazztja : Notahdehts
laid irr tas Wihrs preeſsch to
KUNGU/ kas zelſees un ustaitihs
ſcho Pilsfahtu Jeriku/ kad tas to
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
